# Example Pattern: Structured Document Processing

## The Challenge

Many GLAM institutions have vast collections of structured documents - index cards, forms, registers - containing valuable information locked in physical or image formats. Manual transcription doesn't scale, but the structured nature of these documents makes them ideal candidates for AI-powered processing.

## Don't we just need OCR?

<!-- WHY OCR might not be sufficient -->

## Solution Overview

This pattern uses Visual Language Models (VLMs) combined with structured output generation to automatically extract information from document images while preserving the original structure and relationships.

### What this pattern looks like? 

<!-- Example diagram or illustration of the pattern -->
